caption: A person with a gold watch and a dark grey long-sleeved shirt is crafting on a light-colored wooden table. They are working on a white gridded cutting mat placed next to a decorative paper with the text "S YOU LITTLE Letide Cheer You warm my heart". In the first two frames, the person uses both hands to hold a square of light blue embossed paper over the cutting mat. By the third and fourth frames, the person has moved the blue paper to the right, leaving behind small, scattered white particles or glitter on the surface of the gridded mat. In the final frame, the person's face and glasses are partially visible as they look down at the workspace. The camera angle remains overhead, capturing the movement of the hands and the repositioning of the materials.
